text.title: uv as the Python Lockfile Floor Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules grounding the uv-lockfile-floor methodology plus the `skip-this-methodology` safety rule. Each rule pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Every Python project MUST use `uv` for dependency resolution. `pip-compile`, `poetry lock`, or `pipenv lock` MUST NOT be present alongside `uv.lock`.
rule.rationale: Mixing resolvers produces silently divergent environments; uv is the floor because it owns Python install + resolve + run.

rule.statement: `uv.lock` MUST be committed and updated via `uv lock` (not hand-edited). PRs that modify dependencies without updating the lockfile are rejected.
rule.rationale: Without a committed lock, agents and CI resolve differently than developers; this is the canonical reproducibility break.

rule.statement: AI agents MUST invoke Python tools via `uv run <cmd>` (e.g., `uv run pytest`, `uv run mypy`). Bare `pytest` / `python` calls are forbidden in agent prompts and AGENTS.md.
rule.rationale: Bare invocations pick up the wrong virtualenv or wrong Python version; `uv run` guarantees the lockfile's environment.

rule.statement: `pyproject.toml` MUST specify an exact `requires-python` constraint (e.g., `>=3.12,<3.13`). Floating constraints (`>=3.10`) are forbidden.
rule.rationale: Floating constraints let one dev run on 3.10 and another on 3.13; type-checker and runtime behaviour diverges in subtle ways.

rule.statement: Every Python project's `AGENTS.md` MUST include the `uv run` rule snippet (provided by `templates/agents-md-snippet.md`) so the AI prompt knows to use `uv run`.
rule.rationale: Without an AGENTS.md snippet, even a perfectly configured project gets bare commands from naive agents.

rule.statement: Skip this methodology when the preconditions in `## Applies If` are not all true, or any item in `## Skip If` holds. The decision tree routes to this rule on those branches.
rule.rationale: A methodology that runs on the wrong input wastes tokens and produces misleading artifacts. The explicit skip rule is the safety valve.
